text: My name is Landon Dennis. I'm 36 years
old and I'm from St. George, Utah. I
grew up in the most amazing, wonderful,
loving home with wonderful parents, but
we lived in this house. It had ghosts
and dark entities that would mess with
me. I remember the first time it
happened. I I would go to bed at night
and all a sudden I felt this just
horrible like gives you goosebumps, hair
on your neck, stand up feeling.
And I went to go move this one night and
I could not move. I was paralyzed and it
terrified me. And I looked towards the
corner of the room cuz I could feel some
type of energy coming from there. And
when I looked towards the corner of that
room, I saw this
tall dark figure and it it looked as if
you were to put a cloak on somebody. And
this thing would mess with me all the
time. It was terrifying. I call him
shadow people because he wasn't the only
one. He was just the scariest one for
me. And so those type of things growing
up in this house and those were the bad
things. But I also have really really
cool things that have happened to me.
The night that my my niece passed away
in a car accident when when she was
young, I think about 16, she came to me
in a dream right before my dad got the
phone call from my sister that she
passed away. She she came to me in that
dream and and talked with me and
comforted me. I've also had experiences
with my grandpa who passed away who's
come to me in dreams. So yeah, I grew up
having paranormal experiences. my whole
life, good and bad. And later in my
life, I got into some accidents. I'm
very
accidentrone. I drove off a sand dune
cliff on a four-wheeler, almost died,
broke bones, and that introduced me to
pain pills and drugs. And so from that
time on, I had a really bad addiction.
First to pain pills and then it turned
to heroin. And I ruined a lot of things
in my life through addiction because I
let so many dark forces take a hold of
me that addiction was all and others can
understand. It takes over your life. And
so I was just a drug addict. I I lost a
home, lost my fiance, lost my first
daughter that I'm still trying to
hopefully finally get in touch with
someday. But then I went to I mean if I
if I wasn't in jail for drug use then I
was living on the streets
homeless. But I don't mean to make
people think that I was this really bad
person. I wasn't. I was such a loving
kind person like my parents raised me to
be. But but I would do things in order
to get drugs that I would normally never
do like lie, steal, steal, cheat, those
type of things. especially from my loved
ones. That that was the worst. It would
wouldn't even be other people. I'd be
stealing from my loved ones. And so,
right before my NDE, I was living
homeless behind this church on gravel. I
remember I would have a sleeping bag. I
was miserable. But I also came to the
conclusion at that time that I am
worthless. If if this is what my life is
going to contain, that I can't keep
anything good and I'll push everything
away, my life is is worthless. And I got
remarried after this. And so this this
one day I was at my parents house and
they were away in St. George and me and
my wife were there and again deep into
addiction. I just went straight to the
bathroom. And I know how I did my drugs.
And I would sit up on a counter, a high
counter, and and look into it and do it.
And I guess I overdosed and had some
type of seizure, and I fell backwards
off that high
counter straight to my head on the tile
and just cracked it. And my wife came to
check on me and she just saw me laying
on the ground with a puddle of blood
under my head, my head swelling up just
like a balloon. And so she called the
paramedics. They threw me in the
ambulance and rush into the hospital.
And this is where I come back to my NDE.
All of a sudden, I was above this
ambulance. And I would say I was about I
don't know 4T. It's hard to explain.
four feet above the ambulance, but I
could see through the ambulance as if
imagine an ambulance being made out of
saran wrap, but still a saran wrap
ambulance that you could see through
type thing. It was almost like that. And
and I saw this group of men just working
on me. And I felt so much depression, so
much anxiety, so much grief, so much
loss. It's
just anything that you can think of that
can make you feel really bad is what I
was feeling above that. But all at once,
and I was so confused, I didn't
understand what was happening that I was
looking at myself with these people
working on me. And I, this is another
thing. I remember I could tell the
ambulance was just driving down the
street fast, but me above it, I didn't
feel like I was moving at all, but I was
still going right with it. And I
remember one thought in my head is, wow,
is this it? Am I like a ghost stuck
above my body for the rest of my life?
And it was terrifying, horrible. That
that happened years ago. And I still
when I think about those feelings, it
gives
me such bad anxiety and stuff because it
was very very real. And so I remember
where it almost got to the point where I
couldn't handle it anymore. And and not
even the things that I was seeing cuz it
I wasn't even necessarily focused on the
things I was seeing. I I could see me
through the ambulance and them working
on me, putting this drill needle thing
in my knee. I didn't feel physical pain.
I was just feeling all the emotional and
spiritual pain at that time when I was
watching this. And honestly, I would
have rather felt that physical pain in
my knee. People say it's one of the
worst things that they can do to you to
get an IV in you,
but that emotional and spiritual pain
above that ambulance was
indescribable. And when it got to a
point that it was almost too much, just
boom. There was no white tunnel. There
was nothing like that. I was just all of
a sudden standing in this huge,
beautiful grass field. a beautiful
green. And at first it was just me

when I looked down at the
grass, it I wish I could describe the
color and and the feelings I got just
from this grass with with words. But
words are so inadequate.
The way I've come to think of it is like
spiritual experiences are almost
indescribable in human words, but I do
the best I can. And that grass loved me.
It was amazing
sensation. And as I'm looking down, I
could see every blade of grass. And I I
looked up farther and I would say about
a/4 mile away was just this this hill.
Kind of just rainbowshaped hill.
But I could still see every blade of
grass in front of me, even if I was
focusing on the distance. Like if if you

and you know, you can look down and
start seeing each blade when you focus.
But if you look down at the other end

when I looked up towards that hill, I

thing that on earth is just grass to

Like I just some can imagine, you know,
going from where I was to this and I saw
that
hill and I saw these beautiful lights

Like these colors were
indescribable. And when I saw that I I

And then I noticed this beautiful
purplish violet type
light and I knew it was my

And what was cool about it is when they
were they were doing this to me, it was

yes, we are still here. We are still

will see you
again. But for some reason, wherever I

meaning of that? right behind that hill.
And when I start when I wanted to go
back there after feeling this, I felt
this wonderful presence kind of behind
me to my right. So I I turned a little

lady standing there and and I would say
about 30 and she just kind of had her

smiling at me and it was so comforting.
She was looking at me
like she knew what I was experiencing.
She was like, "How cool is this for him
to see this again?" And I say again
because I I feel like I knew that place
somehow. And that's when she started not
speaking with me. I use the word

because I wanted to go back behind that

And she started speaking with me tell
it's telepathically her words mouth
wasn't moving but it was through
emotions and and like almost experiences
like if if she would have had an
experience in life about a certain word
I felt that experience too and it

amazing things with me
and was telling me a little bit about
why I couldn't go back behind that hill.
But the gratitude that I felt that I

that. And while she's comforting me and

first and
uh it was a man. And so I I turned a

was. And they're sharing with me very

And they started talking about the power

is so
powerful and how any human being on this

when you're thinking you're about to die

they were speaking with me about how
that direct line of prayer is always

think you guys are going to have a a

need to ask.
We are always surrounded by loved ones,
by angels, but we have our agency on
this
earth. And that's a beautiful thing that
we are given free will on this earth.
And it sucks that some people choose to

beautiful. And they they told me we have
our agency on this earth. And when we're

different
names. But if you open that line of

prayers.
But most times not in the way that

our creator has a much better path for

you might not get that specific thing.
But I'll tell you what, if you prayed

turn like the times that I went to jail

gift for
everybody. But when they're speaking

type
thing? And so I I kind of questioned

And I would I would hold the sign up

that that is a that is a horrible thing

And I remember thinking to myself,
